mapper.sql:
where b.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and b.del_flag = 0
and ( b.batch_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or b.channel_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or b.fetch_mode like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or r.reconciliation_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

select b.id, b.source_id as sourceId, b.batch_no as batchNo, b.reconciliation_id as reconciliationId, r.reconciliation_no as reconciliationNo, b.channel_code as channelCode, b.fetch_mode as fetchMode, b.bill_date as billDate, b.request_start_time as requestStartTime, b.request_end_time as requestEndTime, b.request_cursor as requestCursor, b.request_page as requestPage, b.page_size as pageSize, b.response_digest as responseDigest, b.total_count as totalCount, b.fetch_status as fetchStatus, b.fetch_result as fetchResult, b.operator_id as operatorId, b.operator_name as operatorName, b.fetch_start_time as fetchStartTime, b.fetch_end_time as fetchEndTime, b.created_at as createTime
mapper.select: select count(1) from payment_channel_bill_fetch_batch b left join payment_reconciliation r on r.id = b.reconciliation_id and r.tenant_id = b.tenant_id and r.del_flag = 0

from payment_channel_bill_fetch_batch b left join payment_reconciliation r on r.id = b.reconciliation_id and r.tenant_id = b.tenant_id and r.del_flag = 0
order by b.created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
